race.comment: MCWOODY (2) has hit the ground running for the new stable and is right back to the form that earned him a start in the G1 Victoria Derby in the spring. He took out the key lead up and looks even better suited stepping to 2000m. WIGMORE (3) is a fascinating Kiwi import having his first run for the Stokes yard. He stayed on strongly for fourth in the G1 NZ Derby before heading across and now drops 400m off a 49 day freshen. Neindorf is a key booking and you can make a bold case for him. AUTUMN MYSTERY (1) won the G3 Caulfield Classic before a solid Victoria Derby run in the spring and has built steadily this prep. His last run in the G3 Easter Cup at Caulfield was better than it reads and he can run a big race. ENGINE OF WAR (5) came through the same spring features as AUTUMN MYSTERY and is another who is trending the right way. IMPULSIVE REACTION (8) also looks progressive, while MATAHGA (4) can improve sharply with the blinkers going on.
